## Analyzers (1)

Enrich observables with intelligence

### [CIRCLHashlookup v1.1](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/CIRCLHashlookup)
CIRCL hashlookup uses a public API to lookup hash values against databases of known good files

- **Author:** Mikael Keri
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `hash`
